columns.extraction_plan: The total number of participants is reported as 385. This can be extracted from the "Article info" section on page 1, which states "Randomized phase 3 trial of ADT plus D versus ADT alone in 385 mNCPC patients". It is also confirmed in the "Patients and methods" section on page 2: "From October 2004 to December 2008, 385 patients were enrolled". Additionally, Table 1 on page 3 is titled "Characteristics of the patients (n = 385)", and Table 2 on page 4 has a column "All patients n = 385".
